title: AI Authoring Envelope v1
description: Envelope wrapping an AI authoring session contract plus concrete file diffs for CI and automated review.

id.description: Stable identifier for this authoring envelope.

session.description: Inlined AI authoring session contract describing intent and allowed targets.

files.description: Concrete file diffs proposed in this envelope.

fileId.description: Logical identifier for this file within the constellation (stable across edits).

fileKind.description: Declared file kind; must match one of the session.allowedFileKinds.

objectKind.description: Object kind hosted by this file (e.g., 'dungeonRunContract', 'surpriseMechanicContract').

targetPath.description: Repo-relative path this diff applies to.

previousSha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the previous file content for updates; empty for creates.

contentSha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the proposed file content.

content.description: Full proposed file body as UTF-8 text.

referencedIds.description: Optional list of contract IDs, region IDs, or other objects this envelope depends on.

deadLedgerRef.description: Optional reference to a Dead-Ledger attestation for this envelope, if required by tier.
